name: Vegetable Rings on Broccoli Spears
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim leaves and tough ends from broccoli stalks.
2. Cut broccoli into spears.
3. Peel stems with a vegetable peeler; set aside.
4. Rinse red pepper under cold running water.
5. Make a circular cut around the top of the pepper using a paring knife.
6. Pull the stem from the pepper and remove the stem and seeds.
7. Scrape out any remaining seeds and membrane with a spoon.
8. Rinse the pepper under running water; drain well.
9. Thinly slice the pepper crosswise to make rings.
10. To steam broccoli, place a steamer basket in a large saucepan and add 1 inch of water.
11. Place the spears in the steamer.
12. Separate onion slices into rings and place them on top of the broccoli.
13. Cover; bring to a boil over high heat.
14. Steam for about 8 minutes or until broccoli is crisp-tender.
15. Uncover; place pepper rings on top.
16. Cover; steam briefly until pepper rings brighten in color but still hold their shape.
17. Remove from heat; transfer vegetables to a warm serving dish.
18. Melt margarine in a small saucepan over medium heat.
19. Stir in vinegar and rosemary.
20. Drizzle the mixture evenly over the vegetables.
21. Serve immediately.
